creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, the information is not describing any issue, or at least not 
something that I do understand. Please ask your questions on the 
questions mailinglist 
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-questions and when the 
problem had been found please either resolve it, or if it is a real 
problem contact me so that we can normally describe the problem.
